data.body:
## Adversarial Review Summary (Phase 2.5)

Red team (opus) dispatched: 10 findings across 5 taxonomy categories (implicit_shared_state ×3, conflicting_assumptions ×2, dependency_gap ×2, ordering_violation ×2, consumer_impact ×1).

Blue team (sonnet) accepted 10/10 (zero rejected).

Dispositions:
- 2 → new hard dependencies (F5: Story 4 → Story 5)
- 1 → story scope split (F10: baseline-capture pulled into Story 1)
- 7 → Done Definition / consideration additions on existing stories (F1, F2, F3, F4, F6, F7, F8, F9)

No new stories were created; no escalation-to-epic required. The 7-story map absorbs all 10 findings. Chain-of-trust, depth-agnostic contract, LWW semantics, schema_version, compaction ordering, FP fallback scope, and legacy-ticket degradation are now all pinned as Done Definitions on specific stories.

See the PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_v1 comment for the full disposition table, pinned contracts, and dependency graph.
